pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-001 (DQ, Task) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4201 is insufficient to establish relevance to geospatial data analysis, GIS, and location intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.420, eu_ai_act=0.394, onet=0.384) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: DQ domain KSA DQ-T-001 excluded at composite 0.4201, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4201 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4201 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a DQ (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Geospatial Data Analyst. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. DQ KSA with composite 0.4201 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DQ-T-001 (DQ, composite 0.4201) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4201 with signal across ddat=0.420, eu_ai_act=0.394, onet=0.384 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from DQ-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Geospatial Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4201, domain DQ. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
